arts.ttl: Udinese Pursue Mads Roerslev from Brentford
arts.sum: Udinese are pursuing a new addition to their squad, with Danish right-back Mads Roerslev of Brentford emerging as a key target. Following a successful start to the season, where the team currently sits in ninth place in the Serie A standings, Udinese aims to strengthen their defensive line as they look to build on their momentum. The post Udinese Pursue Mads Roerslev from Brentford appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Weekend acca predictions: Five teams to back across Europe
arts.sum: It is set to be another busy week across the continent with action resuming in the Bundesliga and La Liga after the winter hiatus and Liam Flin has scanned the leagues to assemble a five-team acca for Saturday and Sunday.

Udinese have officially secured the services of Norwegian international goalkeeper Egil Selvik, bolstering their goalkeeping department. The 27-year-old arrives in Friuli after playing his most recent season in his home country with Haugesund. The post OFFICIAL: Udinese Sign Erik Selvik appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Udinese v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the second half of the 2024/25 Serie A season kicks off, Atalanta will be looking to reclaim their position at the top of the table when they face Udinese at the Bluenergy Stadium on Saturday. This match marks an important opportunity for both teams as they strive to achieve their respective season goals. The post Serie A | Udinese v Atalanta: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Atalanta’s Gasperini Seeks Striker Reinforcement: Lucca Targeted from Udinese
arts.sum: Atalanta coach Gian Piero Gasperini has made it clear that he is looking for a new striker during the January transfer window. Following injuries to Mateo Retegui and Gianluca Scamacca, Gasperini is pushing for the club to secure at least one attacking option to bolster their squad for the remainder of the season. The post Atalanta’s Gasperini Seeks Striker Reinforcement: Lucca Targeted from Udinese appeared first on FootItalia.com.
